title: Shared-state docs require queued writes
body: Owner clarified that shared-state docs are read/write collaboration surfaces: agents should read current state, write needed handoff or lifecycle updates, and use transaction helpers plus the commit queue/git:index-head window to make overlap safe and visible. Active claims on shared-state docs are coordination signals, not no-write locks. Captured in distilled memory, napkin, and collaboration-state lifecycle docs.
